# Therapy Suggestions & Auto-Generated Plans

**Date:** 2026-04-08
**Status:** Approved
**Approach:** Extend the Specialist node (Approach 1 â€” single LLM call)

## Overview

EmoSync's agent pipeline currently produces conversational grief coaching but no structured therapeutic suggestions or treatment plans. This design adds two capabilities:

1. **Micro-suggestions** â€” inline coping strategies, grounding exercises, and reframes generated by the Specialist alongside its conversational reply (~40-60% of responses).
2. **Auto-generated treatment plans** â€” when a user completes an assessment (PHQ-9/GAD-7), the Specialist generates a full plan with 3-5 goals, persisted to the database. Users can edit/delete afterward.

Both features are LLM-generated on the fly (no predefined exercise catalog) and render as inline cards in the chat flow.

## Decisions

| Decision | Choice | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| When to suggest | Both â€” micro-suggestions inline + richer plans after milestones | Layered approach feels natural for coaching |
| Goal generation | Auto-generate full plan, user edits later | Lower friction than approval flow |
| Exercise source | LLM-generated on the fly | More personalized, simpler architecture |
| Frontend display | Inline cards in chat | Everything stays in conversation flow |
| Architecture | Extend Specialist node | Single LLM call, no added latency |

## Specialist Structured Output Format

The Specialist's response gains a fenced `suggestions` JSON block appended after the conversational reply:

```
[conversational reply â€” 2-4 paragraphs as today]

```suggestions
{
  "micro_suggestion": {
    "title": "Box Breathing Exercise",
    "framework": "act",
    "description": "Try breathing in for 4 counts, holding for 4, out for 4, holding for 4. Repeat 3 times.",
    "rationale": "Your body is holding a lot of tension right now â€” this can help activate your calm response."
  },
  "plan_generation": null
}
`` `
```

### micro_suggestion

Present on ~40-60% of responses. Only when the moment calls for a coping strategy, grounding exercise, or reframe. Set to `null` when the user needs to be heard (venting, acute grief).

Fields:
- `title` â€” short name for the exercise
- `framework` â€” `"cbt"`, `"act"`, or `"narrative"`
- `description` â€” the actual exercise in 1-3 sentences
- `rationale` â€” why this exercise, why now, personalized to context

### plan_generation

Only emitted when `assessment_context.just_completed` is `true`. Set to `null` otherwise.

Fields:
- `title` â€” e.g. "Healing Path â€” April 2026"
- `goals` â€” array of 3-5 objects:
  - `description` â€” actionable, therapeutically grounded goal
  - `target_date` â€” ISO date string, 30-60 days out
  - `framework` â€” which therapeutic framework this goal draws from

Example:
```json
{
  "plan_generation": {
    "title": "Healing Path â€” April 2026",
    "goals": [
      {
        "description": "Practice one grounding exercise daily when anxiety peaks",
        "target_date": "2026-05-08",
        "framework": "act"
      },
      {
        "description": "Identify and challenge 3 catastrophizing thoughts per week using thought records",
        "target_date": "2026-05-08",
        "framework": "cbt"
      },
      {
        "description": "Write a weekly journal entry re-authoring one positive memory",
        "target_date": "2026-06-08",
        "framework": "narrative"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

## Backend Pipeline Changes

### 1. Specialist prompt update â€” `backend/app/agent/prompts.py`

Add to `SPECIALIST_SYSTEM`:
- Instruction to emit a `suggestions` fenced JSON block after the conversational reply
- `micro_suggestion` rules: only when genuinely helpful, include title/framework/description/rationale, set `null` when user needs to be heard
- `plan_generation` rules: only when `assessment_context` includes `just_completed: true`, generate title + 3-5 goals with description/target_date/framework, set `null` otherwise
- Never suggest exercises during crisis or acute distress

### 2. Historian trigger signal â€” `backend/app/agent/nodes/historian.py`

In `historian_node()`, after loading `assessment_context`:
- Compare `assessment.created_at` against a threshold (within last 10 minutes)
- If fresh, set `assessment_context["just_completed"] = True`
- No new LLM call â€” timestamp comparison only

### 3. Post-processing â€” `backend/app/services/chat_turn.py`

New `_extract_suggestions()` function:
1. Parse the ` ```suggestions``` ` fenced block from the final response
2. Strip it from display text (user sees only conversational reply)
3. If `plan_generation` present: acquire an async session via `get_async_session()` from `core/database.py`, persist to `treatment_plans` + `treatment_goals` tables via existing ORM models. Mark any existing active plan as `completed`.
4. Return `(clean_text, suggestions_json)`

Note: `chat_turn.py` currently has no DB access. This change adds a dependency on `core/database.py` for plan persistence only.

SSE stream changes:
- After all `event: token` events finish, emit `event: suggestions` with the JSON payload
- Then emit `event: done` as today

Fallback: if suggestions block is malformed or missing, display conversational reply only. No error.

### 4. Anchor validation â€” `backend/app/agent/nodes/anchor.py`

Add to `ANCHOR_SYSTEM`:
- If a `suggestions` block is present, validate:
  - No exercises during crisis (PHQ-9 >= 20 or self-harm indicators)
  - Rationale is personalized, not generic
  - Framework matches the approach used in the conversation
- If invalid, remove the suggestions block entirely rather than trying to fix it

## Frontend Changes

### 1. SSE event handling â€” `frontend/lib/sse.ts` + `frontend/components/chat_view.tsx`

- Handle new `event: suggestions` SSE event type
- Parse and store suggestions alongside the message in component state (keyed by message ID)

### 2. Inline suggestion cards â€” `frontend/components/chat_view.tsx`

**Micro-suggestion card:**
- Compact card below the message bubble
- Shows: exercise title, framework badge (CBT/ACT/Narrative), description text, rationale in lighter text
- Informational â€” no user action required

**Plan-generated card:**
- Shows plan title and goal count summary (e.g. "3 goals created")
- "View your plan" link/button to existing plans page or goal modal
- Subtle note: "This plan was created based on your assessment. You can edit or remove goals anytime."

**Layout:** Cards render below the message bubble, before existing `[suggest:X]` action buttons. The existing suggest-tag system continues to work alongside.

## Edge Cases

| Scenario | Behavior |
|---|---|
| Suggestions block malformed/missing | Graceful fallback â€” conversational reply only, no error |
| User already has an active plan | New plan generated with status `active`, old plan set to `completed`. One active plan at a time. |
| Crisis detected (PHQ-9 >= 20, self-harm language) | Anchor strips all suggestions. Only crisis resources shown. |
| Stub mode (no GEMINI_API_KEY) | Stub returns no suggestions block. No change to stub behavior. |
| Assessment completed but user hasn't chatted yet | Plan generates on the next chat message, when Historian detects the fresh assessment. |
| Voice chat pathway | Suggestions stripped from spoken text. Not surfaced in voice-only mode. Visible when user switches to text view. |

## Scope Boundaries â€” What We're NOT Building

- No exercise catalog or database of predefined exercises
- No suggestion history/persistence (suggestions live in the chat message only)
- No separate suggestions API endpoint
- No changes to voice pipeline beyond stripping suggestions from spoken text
- No new database tables â€” uses existing `treatment_plans` and `treatment_goals`
- No new pages or routes â€” everything renders inline

## Files Modified

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `backend/app/agent/prompts.py` | Extend `SPECIALIST_SYSTEM` with suggestions output instructions |
| `backend/app/agent/nodes/historian.py` | Add `just_completed` flag to assessment context |
| `backend/app/agent/nodes/anchor.py` | Add suggestion validation rules to `ANCHOR_SYSTEM` |
| `backend/app/services/chat_turn.py` | Add `_extract_suggestions()`, plan persistence, SSE suggestions event |
| `frontend/lib/sse.ts` | Handle `event: suggestions` |
| `frontend/components/chat_view.tsx` | Render micro-suggestion and plan-generated inline cards |
| `backend/tests/test_agent.py` | Test suggestion parsing, plan persistence, edge cases |
